waysOfReading.ModifiableDisplay: Appearance of the text and page layout can be modified according to the capabilities of the reading system (font family and font size, spaces between paragraphs, sentences, words, and letters, as well as color of background and text)
waysOfReading.NoModifiableDisplay: Text and page layout cannot be modified as the reading experience is close to a print version, but reading systems can still provide zooming options
waysOfReading.NoInfoForModifiableDisplay: No information about appearance modifiability is available
waysOfReading.FullNonVisualReadingSupport: All content can be read as read aloud speech or dynamic braille
waysOfReading.SomeNonVisualReadingSupport: Not all of the content will be readable as read aloud speech or dynamic braille
waysOfReading.NoNonVisualReadingSupport: The content is not readable as read aloud speech or dynamic braille
waysOfReading.NoInfoForNonVisualReadingSupport: No information about nonvisual reading is available
waysOfReading.AlternativeText: Has alternative text descriptions for images
waysOfReading.TextSynchronizedPrerecordedAudio: All the content is available as prerecorded audio synchronized with text
waysOfReading.PrerecordedAudioClips: Prerecorded audio clips are embedded in the content

navigation.TableOfContents: Table of contents to all chapters of the text via links
navigation.IndexProvided: Index with links to referenced entries
navigation.StructuredNavigation: Elements such as headings, tables, etc for structured navigation
navigation.PageNavigation: Page list to go to pages from the print source version

richContent.MathDescriptions: Text descriptions of math are provided
richContent.ExtendedImageDescriptions: Information-rich images are described by extended descriptions
richContent.ClosedCaptions: Videos included in publications have closed captions
richContent.OpenCaptions: Videos included in publications have open captions

conformance.MinimumStandards: The publication contains a conformance statement that it meets the EPUB Accessibility and WCAG 2 Level {wcagLevel} standard
conformance.MeetsStandards: The publication contains a conformance statement that it meets the EPUB Accessibility and WCAG 2 Level {wcagLevel} standard
conformance.ExceedsStandards: The publication contains a conformance statement that it meets the EPUB Accessibility and WCAG 2 Level {wcagLevel} standard
conformance.IndeterminateStandards: Conformance to accepted standards for accessibility of this publication cannot be determined
conformance.CertifierReport: For more information refer to the {CertifierReport}

hazards.HazardsUnknown: The presence of hazards is unknown
hazards.FlashingContent: The publication contains flashing content which can cause photosensitive seizures
hazards.NoFlashingContent: The publication does not contain flashing content that can cause photosensitive seizures
hazards.UnknownFlashingContent: The presence of flashing content that can cause photosensitive seizures could not be determined
hazards.MotionSimulation: The publication contains motion simulations that can cause motion sickness
hazards.NoMotionSimulation: The publication does not contain motion simulations that can cause motion sickness
hazards.UnknownMotionSimulation: The presence of motion simulations that can cause motion sickness could not be determined
hazards.Sounds: The publication contains sounds that can cause sensitivity issues
hazards.NoSounds: The publication does not contain sounds that can cause sensitivity issues
hazards.UnknownSounds: The presence of sounds that can cause sensitivity issues could not be determined

legalConsiderations.ClaimsExemption: This publication claims an accessibility exemption in some jurisdictions

additionalInformation.HighContrastAudio: High contrast between foreground and background audio
additionalInformation.HighContrastText: High contrast between text and background
additionalInformation.NonColorMeansOfConveyingInformation: Color is not the sole means of conveying information
additionalInformation.UltraHighContrastText: Ultra high contrast between text and background
